---
title: Citation
---

# Citing flixpatrol

To cite this package in publications, use:

> 
> Doe J (2026). _flixpatrol: R Client for the FlixPatrol Streaming
Rankings API_. R package version 0.2.0.

## BibTeX entry

```bibtex
@Manual{,
  title = {flixpatrol: R Client for the FlixPatrol Streaming Rankings API},
  author = {Jane Doe},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.2.0},
}
```
